message:
🌱 ollama: Do not prompt to install CLI if already on `$PATH` (#1085)

* 🌱 Add ollama: Do not prompt to install CLI if already on `$PATH` mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: remove closed PR and update resolution for ollama#283

PR #3240 was closed without merge and no clean merged fix was found.
Remove pr field from sourceUrls and update resolution summary to note
the issue was closed with no single merged PR identified as the fix.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "ollama-283-do-not-prompt-to-install-cli-if-already-on-path",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "ollama: Do not prompt to install CLI if already on `$PATH`",
+    "description": "Do not prompt to install CLI if already on `$PATH`. This issue affects 20+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "closed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify ollama troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your ollama installation:\n```bash\nollama --version\nollama list\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review ollama configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant ollama configuration:\nWhen launching the Ollama application, a dialog window will appear and prompt you for administrative access in order to “install” the command line executable, which in practice means symlinking `/Applications/Ollama.app/Contents/Resources/ollama` to"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Do not prompt to install CLI if already on `$PATH`",
+        "description": "If Ollama is installed via brew or the user wishes to manage their path manually they will be prompted to install the CLI when opening the Ollama Mac app. This change attempts to check if Ollama is already set in the path, and if it is found the user is not prompted to link the executable to `/usr/local/bin/ollama`.\n\n- rather than checking if the symlink is set try to spawn common shells and see if ollama is available within them\n- make init async to allow for spawning shells\n- check for `step`\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Do not prompt to install CLI if already on `$PATH` is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest ollama to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The issue was closed without a single merged fix. PR #3240, which attempted to check if ollama was already on PATH before prompting, was closed without merge. No clean merged PR was identified that resolves this issue.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
